note: Captured live via gemini --approval-mode yolo -p. Deny honored: 'Error executing tool run_shell_command: Tool execution blocked' with dg's cooldown reason. Payload is Claude-shaped (tool_input.command) with a string ISO timestamp. CRITICAL: gemini reads the hook timeout field in MILLISECONDS (default 60000) and FAILS OPEN on hook timeout — the original timeout:60 made gemini kill dg at 60ms and run the install ungated; the entry now omits timeout. Headless runs need GEMINI_CLI_TRUST_WORKSPACE=true.
